message:
fix(learn): add missing "use client" directive to lessonProgress

The lessonProgress.ts module uses React hooks (useQuery, useMutation,
useCallback, useEffect) and browser APIs (window, CustomEvent,
localStorage). These require the "use client" directive in Next.js
App Router to function correctly.
